mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.username, u.real_name, p.name AS pet_name, p.image AS pet_image, p.breed AS pet_breed FROM adoption a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN pet p ON a.pet_id = p.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT a.*, p.name AS pet_name, p.image AS pet_image, p.breed AS pet_breed FROM adoption a LEFT JOIN pet p ON a.pet_id = p.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adoption (user_id, pet_id, reason, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{petId}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adoption WHERE status = 'pending'
